reviews.comment:
Buena estacion lo raro de la zona que me llamo la atencion andan todas las motos sin casco y llevando pasjeros que tampoco los tienen hoy me cruce 3 en una moto de terror y cargan nafta igual y nadie les pide nada

(Translated by Google)
Good station. What's strange about the area, what caught my attention, is that all the motorcycles are riding without helmets and carrying passengers who also aren't wearing them. Today I saw three on a really bad motorcycle, and they're filling up with gas anyway, and nobody says anything to them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXb3FqYkZ3EAE
